query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image dominated by soft gradients of light and shadow, with a brighter horizontal band crossing through the center and subtle darker masses at the upper and lower edges.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract grayscale image rendered with extreme intentional blur that dissolves all detail into soft gradients, featuring a washed-out muted palette with oppressive low contrast that flattens light and shadow into indistinction, where no recognizable subject emerges from the haze.
